response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (the video contains no vocal music). 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was used to define the scene boundaries for the fan message slideshow and the transition to the live stage. Manual transcription was performed for the spoken English dialogue and for the prominent on-screen title cards. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual text cards to their on-screen duration. Spoken dialogue was timed strictly to vocal onset and offset, using instantaneous transitions (Line 1 'e' equals Line 2 's') for continuous speech to prevent cascading delays.
